---
title: "About"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/jacksonjfraser
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jacksonfraser-aero

---

I'm an Aeronautical Engineering student at the University of Glasgow (BEng Hons, 2028), interested in quantitative finance and markets. I write here about my projects — mostly statistics, simulation, and decision-making under uncertainty.

Currently: Kelly-criterion betting simulator exploring reinforcement learning

[GitHub](https://github.com/jacksonfraser-aero) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jacksonjfraser)
